description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The figure is dressed in a long-sleeved top and fitted pants, with shoes visible on the feet. The facial features are human-like, and the head is proportionate to the body, with short, neatly styled hair. The clothing appears to be casual and form-fitting, suitable for everyday urban environments. The figure's posture is symmetrical, and the limbs are straight, with no visible accessories or carried items. The overall appearance is clean and minimalistic, with smooth surfaces and simple geometry.
description: An adult pedestrian in a T-pose, wearing casual, fitted clothing and shoes, with short hair and a clean, minimalistic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, outstretched arms, and frontal details of the clothing and shoes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, torso, and legs, with one arm and the side of the body visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by the background, with little detail of the figure visible.
description_view_3: Back and side view with the figure largely hidden, only a small part of the body is visible.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
